staging_pair_submit_map_cycle_1080p_rgba.note: 1080p RGBA copy + map; observed cross-run sigma ~10% on a loaded dev host. Wider budget absorbs that without hiding real 1.3x slowdowns.

frame_pool/acquire_release/cpu_1080p_rgb.note: ~12ns op; tiny absolute deltas easily exceed 5% percent. 10% trades sensitivity for noise floor.
